hook.summary: A hand cursor efficiently clears a crowded parking lot by matching car colors to a queue of waiting passengers.
hook.visual_action: A hand cursor taps on a red car, then blue cars, which move to a loading zone to pick up matching passengers.

scene_flow: The video opens with a complex car puzzle and a line of colored passengers.
A hand cursor selects cars in the correct order to match the front of the passenger line.
Matched cars move to the top slots, fill up with passengers, and drive away.
The gameplay continues, showing the strategic clearing of the parking lot.
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers who enjoy sorting and matching puzzles with satisfying mechanics.
